action_items.title: Fix PostgreSQL connection pooling config to reduce replication lag
action_items.description: Replication lag is hitting 800ms under load, exceeding the 200ms threshold. Revisit connection pooling configuration. Coordinate with DBA team (see AI-004).
action_items.source_evidence: Miguel: 'I think we need to revisit the connection pooling config. I can have a fix ready by next Wednesday'

action_items.title: Set up mandatory resource tagging policies in Terraform
action_items.description: Team has lost 3 test environments this week due to untagged instances. AWS budget is 40% over monthly allocation. Implement mandatory tagging to prevent orphaned resources.
action_items.source_evidence: Pedro: 'I'll set up mandatory tagging policies in Terraform by Friday'

action_items.title: Draft rollback runbook with demo-safe fallback section
action_items.description: No rollback automation exists for production migration. Manual recovery could take hours. Must include a 'demo-safe fallback' section: if new cluster isn't ready by April 10 Vodafone demo, the old cluster must run the demo transparently.
action_items.source_evidence: Sofia: 'can you also draft a rollback runbook?' + 'add that to the rollback runbook — a section on demo-safe fallback'

action_items.title: Loop in DBA team on PostgreSQL replication issue
action_items.description: Sofia instructed Miguel not to solve the replication lag issue alone. Coordinate with DBA team for guidance on the 800ms lag under load.
action_items.source_evidence: Sofia: 'loop in the DBA team on the replication issue, don't try to solve it alone'

action_items.title: Update migration timeline document
action_items.description: Migration is behind the original end-of-March schedule. Timeline document needs to reflect current status and revised dates.
action_items.source_evidence: Miguel: 'Should I also update the migration timeline doc?' — Sofia: 'Yes please'

action_items.title: Create regression test suite for Kubernetes migration
action_items.description: First version of a regression test suite specifically targeting the migration. Coordinate with Miguel for staging dataset access (see AI-007).
action_items.source_evidence: Sofia: 'we need a regression test suite specifically for the migration' — Ana: 'I'll have a first version by April 3rd'

action_items.title: Provide Ana access to staging dataset for test data
action_items.description: Ana needs access to the staging dataset to build the regression test suite. Miguel to grant access.
action_items.source_evidence: Sofia: 'Miguel, make sure Ana has access to the staging dataset'

action_items.title: Clean up 23 Sonar code smells in migration branch
action_items.description: Sonar scan flagged 23 new code smells in the migration branch. Not critical but should be resolved before merging to main. Lower priority than regression suite.
action_items.source_evidence: Ana: 'the Sonar scan flagged 23 new code smells in the migration branch' — Sofia: 'Add it to the list'

action_items.title: Send calendar invite for Thursday progress check
action_items.description: Weekly regroup to check migration progress ahead of April 10 Vodafone demo deadline.
action_items.source_evidence: Sofia: 'Let's regroup next Thursday to check progress. I'll send a calendar invite'
